import os
from flask import Flask, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)


@app.route("/dashboard")
def dashboard():
    if os.environ.get("FEATURE_NEW_DASHBOARD", "false") == "true":
        return render_new_dashboard()
    return render_old_dashboard()


@app.route("/settings")
def settings():
    if os.environ.get("FEATURE_NEW_DASHBOARD", "false") == "true":
        return render_new_settings()
    return render_old_settings()


@app.route("/api/users")
def list_users():
    if os.environ.get("FEATURE_ENHANCED_USERS", "false") == "true":
        users = fetch_users_v2()
    else:
        users = fetch_users_v1()
    return jsonify(users)


@app.route("/api/reports")
def reports():
    if os.environ.get("FEATURE_ENHANCED_USERS", "false") == "true":
        return generate_enhanced_report()
    return generate_basic_report()
